title: Preparation of BG-11 media Agar
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"52fdp","text":"This is for making solid media of BG-11","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To make BG-11 Agar plates, add Agar-Agar Type-1 equivalent to 1.5% (w/v) of liquid media and autoclave.
Then before it solidifies (when the flask is bearable to touch), add the required antibiotics to the media.
Pour ~30-40 ml into plates soon after.
Keep the plates opened in the hood.
Once it solidifies in the plates then close those and keep the plates inverted into a cold storage.
creator: Ashwinuday
